title: xCraft
description: Speed-up your early game multiplying drops, furnace speed, and more...
body:
# xCraft Speed-up your early game multiplying drops, furnace speed, and more... [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/xcraft_real) **·** [Github](https://github.com/polvallverdu/xcraft/releases)
## Features - **Ore Drops Multiplier**: Multiply the resources you mine.
- **Furnace Speed**: Increase the speed of the furnace.
- **Entity Drops Multiplier**: Multiply the drops of all mobs.
- **XP Multiplier**: Increase the amount of XP from the orbs.
- _more to come soon..._ (suggestions are welcome) ## Configuration - You can configure each multiplier separately ## Planned - Permissions-based multiplier - Commands to change config ## Installation ### Fabric - Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) and Fabric API. - Download this mod - Put the mod in the mods folder ### Forge _Forge support is planned. In theory it's done, but there are some issues with mixins. I'm open to contributions._ ## License This mod is licensed under the Apache 2.0. Feel free to use it in any modpack, always giving the proper credits.
